26781.title: Keeping Up Appearances
26781.description: When Hyacinth and the long-suffering Richard spend their first day in their new weekend residence, it proves to be less than adequate in size. Hyacinth invites Elizabeth and Emmet round for country tea, but both this and her plans to fit in with the local way of life go terribly wrong.

26799.title: Keeping Up Appearances
26799.description: Hyacinth volunteers Richard's services when there is a problem with the lights at the church hall, and he reluctantly agrees despite the fact that DIY is not really his forte.
